title: Earnings Update: Intellia Therapeutics Q1 2026 Results and Analyst Forecast Changes
text: Intellia Therapeutics exceeded market expectations in its first-quarter results. The company reported revenues of US$15 million, beating forecasts by 9.0%, while statutory losses of US$0.81 per share were 9.0% smaller than anticipated. Following the earnings release, analyst sentiment showed modest improvement. The consensus from 21 analysts remains relatively stable, with 2026 revenue expectations at US$60.4m representing an 8.5% decline year-over-year. However, there was a positive adjustment to loss-per-share forecasts, improving from US$3.52 to US$3.25. The average price target held steady at US$26.65. However, analyst opinions show considerable variation, ranging from a bullish US$95.00 to a bearish US$8.00 per share, indicating widely different views on what kind of performance this business can generate. The company underperforms relative to its biotech peers. While NTLA faces a forecasted 11% annualized revenue decline, the broader biotech industry is expected to grow 22% annually, positioning Intellia as a laggard within its sector.
